concerns.text: FR-006 proposes fitting a GLMM with a quadratic term (TokenCount^2) and then using the *vertex* of that quadratic to identify the 'optimal prompt size'. In a logistic‑link GLMM the linear predictor is transformed by the logistic function, so the location of the maximum predicted probability is not simply the vertex of the quadratic term and may lie outside the observed token range. Relying on the quadratic coefficient’s vertex to define an optimal point is therefore methodologically unsound and can produce misleading conclusions about diminishing returns.
